title: 目標達成の後に・越えられない河

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Dash...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
(It was so obvious! Of course things were the way
they were! It makes total sense that nobody cared
about me.)

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
(Teio was incredible out there, and so was
Brusquement! I can't run like them, at least not
yet.)

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
(That's why nobody spared me a glance. But if the
crowd saw me race like them, then maybe...
Maybe!)

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Diaaa! Sorry to keep you waiting!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Huh? Hang on. Are those reporters?

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Now that Satono Diamond's long-awaited debut
is happening this year, the Satono Group's heiress
will finally make her entrance!

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
What are your aspirations? Do you already have
a goal in mind for next year?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Of course I do. However, I'm focusing on what is
in front of me right now...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Dia... She hasn't even debuted yet, but
everyone's rushing to interview her...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's right before the beginning of the Classic
Triple Crown series, and Kitasan Black has built
up an impressive resume.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's been a slow and steady climb, but she's
definitely improved. I'm sure she has a fighting
chance in the Classic Triple Crown as she is now.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I wonder if I'll actually be able to do this right...
choice_data_list: What do you mean by doing things "right"?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I don't know if I'll be able to give people a
performance worth watching in the Classic Triple
Crown. I realized something recently.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
There's something fundamental I'm missing, and
it's not just strength or speed.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I'm missing the glitz and glam that attracts
people's attention.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Teio isn't just strong. She's also incredibly cool,
and the way she runs with her featherlight steps
really makes her stand out above the rest.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Dia's the same. People's eyes have been glued to
her even before she became a racer because of
the natural brilliance she was born with...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
But I don't have anything like that. I'm plain, and
nobody expects anything of me...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
So can I actually become a star in the Classics?
Will I really manage to become an Umamusume
that makes people smile?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I know what she means. There are always going to
be Umamusume who are wildly popular right from
the get-go.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Being a good racer doesn't necessarily translate
into popularity, but even if that's the case...
choice_data_list:
I think there's a good chance things will work
out.

I think there's a good chance things will work
out.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Even... for me?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As long as she continues to grow, people are
bound to take notice of her, and Kitasan Black is
already climbing up those stairs steadily.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I'm not confident enough to try running in the
Satsuki Sho or Japanese Derby just yet, though...
choice_data_list:
We'll just have to keep preparing till you are,
then.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What we can and can't do all comes down to
Kitasan Black's mindset. For now, we set our
sights on the St. Lite Kinen in the fall.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And whether or not she decides to run in them, I
think it'll be good to prepare for the Satsuki Sho
and Japanese Derby at the same time.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
(I really do want to run in the Satsuki Sho and
Derby... Trainer says I can do it, but...)

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Oh?! I-is that...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Do another lap, Brusquement. That one was far
too unrefined.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You've always been overconfident during critical
moments. It's about time you learned to control
those powerful legs my mother helped you hone.

text_block_list.name: Brusquement
text_block_list.text: Yes, ma'am...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
(Peers... Umas who grew up in the same
environment and understand each other on an
intrinsic level... I don't have anyone like that.)

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
(The relationship I share with Dia and Teio isn't
like that. And it's not only those two...)

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
(The Umamusume around me are all friendly
enough, but it's like they're part of a different
world...)

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Wh-wh-whoooooa!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Wh-who are you?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I'm Sakura Bakushin O, a class representative!
Aha! And you!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
You must be Kitasan Black! I can feel it. I can feel
your heart reaching out to me for help!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what?! Bakushin O? What are you talking
about all of a sudden? Huh? I don't...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I mean! You're not wrong. I really could use some
help, but...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: How in the world could you feel that?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
There's no logic or reason to it! It just came to
me, like the powerful pull of fated destiny! It
sucked me in like a black hole!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: You're looking for destiny, aren't you?!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Y-yeah! Probably?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
That's beyond perfect, then! You want to know
why?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Because I'm a class representative, and you're the
clutch captain! When it comes to helping people,
we're practically peas in a pod!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Well, when you put it like that, it actually does
make sense...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Doesn't it just? What you need is a class
representative to point you in the right direction.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
And that's where I come in! Don't you worry about
a thing. I'm fully qualified, after all!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Th-thank you! I didn't expect anyone to go so far
as to offer me help, but I'm looking forward to
working with you!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Good answer! Now, time to charge full steam
ahead!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
From today, we are united under the Team
Bakushin banner!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Okay, so your next goal is the St. Lite Kinen, and
you want to win some races leading up to it, huh?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
When push comes to shove, you just gotta train!
C'mon, now! Bakushin, Bakushiiin!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Okay! Bakushin, Bakushiiin!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, listen to this! I found someone who'll be a
big help!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She tells me what happened yesterday. I noticed
Kitasan Black's been a bit gloomy lately, but she
may have found exactly who she needed to
brighten up.
